column1: 2004-08-11вҖҺ"A jobless man applied for the position of ""office boy"" at Microsoft. The HR manager interviewed him then watched him cleaning the floor as a test. ""You are employed"" he said.""Give me your e-mail address and I'll send you the application to fill in

column5: If you don't have an email

column7: cannot have the job.The man left with no hope at all. He didn't know what to do
column8: with only $10 in his pocket. He then decided to go to the supermarket and buy a 10 Kg tomato crate. He then sold the tomatoes in a door to door round. In less than two hours
column9: he succeeded to double his capital. He repeated the operation three times
column10: and returned home with $60. The man realized that he can survive by this way
column11: and started to go everyday earlier
column13: his money doubled or tripled every day. Shortly
column16: then he had his own fleet of delivery vehicles. 5 years later

column21: ""I don't have an email"". The broker answered curiously
